skills.clawhub_display_name: AI-powered Automated Concentrated Liquidity Manager for Uniswap v4. Manage liquidity positions, auto-rebalance out-of-range positions, optimize LP fees dynamically, execute limit orders (stop-loss, take-profit), and monitor oracle signals — all from chat. Deployed on Ethereum Sepolia with verified contracts.
